summary: Completed testing of new golf tournament features: event date (September 3, 2026), early bird pricing ($125 before June 20th, $150 after), and Extras & Prizes section. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/tournament-info returns early bird pricing fields (is_early_bird, early_bird_price, regular_price, early_bird_deadline)
Backend: Dynamic pricing returns $125/player (early bird active since current date < June 20, 2026)
Backend: Individual registration works with team assignment
Backend: Team registration works with 2-4 players
Backend: Admin authentication and dashboard working
Frontend: Landing page Date card shows 'September 3, 2026'
Frontend: Landing page Price card shows '$125 / Player' with early bird note
Frontend: Early Bird Special banner shows $125 with $150 strikethrough
Frontend: Extras & Prizes section has Long Drive Competition, Closest to the Pin, Mulligans cards
Frontend: Team Prizes section has 1st, 2nd, 3rd, and Last Place cards
Frontend: Individual Registration page shows $125 with early bird note
Frontend: Team Registration page shows dynamic pricing with early bird note
Frontend: Confirmation page shows event date September 3, 2026
Frontend: Confirmation page shows $125 early bird price
Frontend: Full individual registration flow works end-to-end
seed_data_creation: Test players created during registration tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from this session are working: event date September 3, 2026, early bird pricing ($125 before June 20, 2026, $150 after), Extras & Prizes section with Long Drive, Closest to Pin, Mulligans, and Team Prizes (1st, 2nd, 3rd, Last Place). The /api/tournament-info endpoint returns all pricing fields correctly. Dynamic pricing is working based on current date vs early bird deadline.
